title: Id serde Deserialize accepts empty string, breaking invariant
description: Id and UTCDate use serde(transparent), delegating Deserialize to String. A server JSON field with value empty-string deserializes into Id or UTCDate with empty inner value, silently breaking the Guaranteed non-empty invariant. Id::new() empty-check provides no protection because serde never calls new(). This is distinct from xbt.1 (from_trusted naming): the primary ingestion path, serde deserialization of server responses, bypasses validation entirely. Fix: implement Deserialize manually or via a newtype visitor that rejects empty strings.
